---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(brms)
library(tidyverse)
library(BayesFactor)
library(BayesianId)

data(mtcars)
data("epilepsy")
```

```{r}
mtcars %>% select(mpg, disp, wt) %>% cor() %>% round(2)
```

```{r}
data("penguins")
levels(penguins$island)
```

```{r}
nc = length(levels(penguins$island)) - 1
contrasts(penguins$island) = contr_banova(nc + 1)
contrasts(penguins$island)
X = model.matrix(~ flipper_len + island, data = na.omit(penguins))
head(X)
colMeans(X)
```
```{r}
x_names = parse_formula(body_mass ~ flipper_len + bill_len + island)$fixed_main
is_factor = rep(FALSE, times = length(x_names))
for(i in 1:length(x_names)){
  is_factor[i] = is.factor(penguins[, x_names[i]]) | is.character(penguins[, x_names[i]])
}
is_factor
```


```{r}
sd_code = "
  vector[Kc] sd_X;
  for (i in 2:K) {
    sd_X[i - 1] = sd(X[, i]);
  }
"
stancode(body_mass ~ flipper_len + bill_len + island, 
         data = na.omit(penguins),
         prior = set_prior("normal(0, sigma/sd_X)", class = "b"),
         stanvars = stanvar(name = "sd_X", scode = sd_code, block = "tdata", position = "end")
         )
```
```{r}
bar = brm(body_mass ~ flipper_len + bill_len, 
         data = na.omit(penguins),
         prior = set_prior("normal(0, sigma/sd_X)", class = "b"),
         stanvars = stanvar(name = "sd_X", scode = sd_code, block = "tdata", position = "end"),
         refresh = 0,
         seed = 1212)

summary(bar)
```

```{r}
barbar = brm(body_mass ~ flipper_len + bill_len, 
         data = na.omit(penguins),
         prior = set_prior(paste0("normal(0, sigma/", sd(na.omit(penguins)$flipper_len), ")"), class = "b", coef = "flipper_len") + set_prior(paste0("normal(0, sigma/", sd(na.omit(penguins)$bill_len), ")"), class = "b", coef = "bill_len"),
         refresh = 0,
         seed = 1212)
summary(barbar)
```



```{r}
X = model.matrix(~ disp + wt - 1, data = mtcars) %>% scale(center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)
N = nrow(X)
V = solve(t(X)%*%X/N)
V
```


```{r}
fit <- brm_jzs(mpg ~ disp + wt,
               #mpg ~ disp + wt + disp:wt, 
               data = mtcars, 
               family = gaussian(),
               #r = sqrt(2)/4,
               r = 1,
               iter = 10000,
               )
```

```{r}
result = inc_tests(fit)
print(result$inc_table)
```

```{r}
print(result$model_table)
```

```{r}
result_comp = regressionBF(mpg ~ disp + wt,
               #mpg ~ disp + wt + disp:wt, 
               data = mtcars,
               #rscaleCont = sqrt(2)/4,
               rscaleCont = 1)
print(result_comp/result_comp[3])
```
